calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 balanced hazard-event curriculum -- substrate validation (fix2, supersedes V3-EXQ-470a)
items.note: Fix for EXQ-470a: episodes still died before curriculum_interval=25 tick under hazard_harm=0.05/num_hazards=4. Compound fix: num_hazards 4->2, hazard_harm 0.05->0.02, curriculum_interval 25->10. Substrate-readiness diagnostic only; no claim_ids beyond SD-029 curriculum-level substrate.
